summary: Tested admin pages mobile responsiveness at 375x812 viewport - ALL 3 TABS PASS. No horizontal overflow detected on Low Stock, Delivery Boxes, or Drivers Performance tabs. Card-based layouts work correctly for mobile.

low_stock_tab.description: Card-based layout showing: product image, name, category, stock badge, price, view button, seller info (name + phone). Summary stats at bottom showing item counts by stock level. No horizontal scroll.

delivery_boxes_tab.description: Card-based stats (Total boxes, Available, Assigned, Owned, Damaged). Tab navigation (Boxes, Assign Box, Settings). Search and Add box inputs. Empty state message displayed. No horizontal scroll.

drivers_performance_tab.description: Summary stat cards (Total drivers, Completed orders, Avg delivery time, Avg rating, Total earnings). Filter dropdowns for period and city. Driver cards showing: rank, name, city, orders count, delivery time, acceptance rate, cancellation count. No horizontal scroll.

critical_code_review_comments: LowStockTab.js - Well implemented card layout with proper mobile constraints (min-w-0, truncate, flex-shrink-0)
DeliveryBoxesTab.js - Uses grid-cols-5 for stats which may be tight on mobile but works, card layout for boxes list
DriversPerformanceTab.js - Grid layout (grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-5) responsive, driver cards work well on mobile
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 newly converted admin tabs (LowStockTab, DeliveryBoxesTab, DriversPerformanceTab) verified for mobile responsiveness at 375px viewport width. Card-based layouts work correctly with no horizontal overflow. Combined with iteration_96 results, all admin tabs now use card layouts for mobile: DeliveryTab, UsersTab, SellersTab, DriversMapTab, LowStockTab, DeliveryBoxesTab, DriversPerformanceTab.

testing_evidence.overflow_check_formula: scrollWidth === clientWidth (both 375px at all scroll positions)
screenshots_taken: lowstock_mobile_v3.png - Shows card layout with 7 low-stock products
lowstock_scrolled.png - Shows more products after scrolling
lowstock_bottom.png - Shows summary stats (6 items 4-5 qty, 1 item 1-3 qty, 0 out of stock)
deliveryboxes_mobile_v3.png - Shows stats cards and empty state
driversperf_mobile_v3.png - Shows driver performance cards with stats
